ogTitle: Shell Cove vs Shellharbour City Centre: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shell Cove and Shellharbour City Centre.
heading: Shell Cove vs Shellharbour City Centre — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shell Cove, New South Wales and Shellharbour City Centre, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shellharbour City Centre has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Shell Cove (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shell Cove or Shellharbour City Centre safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shell Cove has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Shellharbour City Centre scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shell Cove scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Shellharbour City Centre scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shell Cove or Shellharbour City Centre?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shellharbour City Centre has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
